steps.title: Use the memorization expectation
steps.content: The narrator says she was supposed to memorize the whole piano piece. When she looked up to see what notes came next, she was breaking that performance expectation.

steps.title: Define cheating in context
steps.content: The matching choice describes violating an expectation about how to perform the piece. Choice B invents an advantage over other contestants, Choice C invents deception of a teacher, and Choice D invents self-deception about ability. The answer is A.
